saints.en: St. Apostle James, Brother of the Lord

rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» - 6 стихир ап., Сл.: ап, І нині: хрестобогород. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар ап., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря ап. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. ап.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар ап. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря ап. Катизми черг., сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон Октоїха і ап. На 9-ій пісні – «Чеснішу від херувимів». По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: світильний ап., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар ап., Сл., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря ап. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. ап.
Часи: на 1-му – дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – ап.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – Кол. 261 зач.; 4, 10-18. Єв. – Лк. 50 зач.; 10, 1-15.

troparion_en.text: As the Lord’s disciple you received the Gospel, O Just one;1  /  as a martyr you have unfailing courage; /  as the Brother of the Lord, you have boldness;  / as a hierarch, you are able to intercede.  / Entreat Christ God that our souls may be saved.

kontakion_en.text:
(Podoben: “You were lifted up on the Cross...”)
When God the Word, the Only-begotten of the Father, / came to dwell among us in these latter days,  / He declared you, O glorious James, to be the first shepherd and teacher of Jerusalem  / and a faithful steward of spiritual Mysteries.  / Therefore, we all honor you, O Apostle.

matched_oca_saint: Apostle James, the Brother of the Lord

oca_saints.name: Saint Macarius the Roman of Mesopotamia

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Macarius, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Apostle James, the Brother of the Lord

troparion.text: As the Lord’s disciple you received the Gospel, O Just one;1  /  as a martyr you have unfailing courage; /  as the Brother of the Lord, you have boldness;  / as a hierarch, you are able to intercede.  / Entreat Christ God that our souls may be saved.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You were lifted up on the Cross...”)
When God the Word, the Only-begotten of the Father, / came to dwell among us in these latter days,  / He declared you, O glorious James, to be the first shepherd and teacher of Jerusalem  / and a faithful steward of spiritual Mysteries.  / Therefore, we all honor you, O Apostle.

oca_saints.name: Translation of the relics of Blessed James of Borovichi, Wonderworker of Novgorod

troparion.text: Enlightened by Divine Grace,  /  after death you grant healing to those who come to you, most wise James, /  and now we honor the transfer of your precious relics, rejoicing in both soul and body. /  Therefore, we all cry:  / “Glory to Him Who gave you strength.  / Glory to Him Who crowned you. /  Glory to Him Who, through you, grants healing to all.”

kontakion.text: Like a bright star, O Father,  / you shone forth in the east, and came west, O blessed one, at the transfer of your relics. /  Now, like the rays of the sun, you radiate healing for those who come to the shrine of your relics.  / Pray to Christ God to save the Orthodox people who pray to you, that all may cry:  / “Rejoice, divinely-wise James.”

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Ignatius, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

O Venerable Father Elisha, you struggled wondrously with Saint Laurence.  / Emulating your teacher, you threw earthly glory and honor beneath the feet of Christ; /  therefore, the Lord has crowned you with the imperishable crown of His glory.
